title: agentwork/v1 frontmatter (AIP-13)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-13 doctype. The `schema` discriminator selects between the work-item branch (project / initiative / task — the original `work/v1` doctype, with the `kind` field discriminating the three variants) and the workspace branch (`work.workspace/v1` — used both as the workspace-root manifest at the company root and as a per-consumer view that extends a parent manifest).

schema.description: Spec discriminator. Always 'work/v1' for the project / initiative / task doctypes.

slug.description: Machine identifier. Lowercase, digits, dashes. Unique within (company, kind).

kind.description: The doctype variant. Drives per-kind constraints.

status.description: Current status. Transitions enforced by the host.

parent.description: Containment axis — what this is part of. Cascade-delete semantics. Null for top-level.

scope.description: Applicability axis — most-restrictive non-empty field wins; AND across fields. Inherits from parent when empty.

assignee.description: Ownership axis — tasks only. Null = unclaimed.

lead.description: Ownership axis — projects and initiatives only. Null = unassigned.

members.description: Projects only — explicit member list when access is narrower than role-based.

attachments.description: Inert references — informational only. NOT containment. Removing target MUST NOT cascade.

then.description: Tasks MUST NOT use 'lead' — they have an 'assignee'.
Projects MUST NOT use 'assignee' — they have a 'lead'.
Initiatives MUST NOT use 'assignee' — they have a 'lead'.
Top-level doctypes (no parent) MUST set scope.company.

workspace.description: Workspace manifest doctype. Used both as the root manifest of a work tree (no `extends`) and as a per-consumer view (with `extends`). The same schema validates both modes; the host distinguishes by whether `extends` is set. Mirrors the AIP-10 `knowledge.workspace/v1` shape so the registry-of-views pattern is uniform across the AIP family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the workspace manifest doctype.

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the workspace or view.

description.description: One-paragraph statement of purpose: what this workspace (or view) is for and who uses it.

version.description: Semantic version of the WORKSPACE shape. Bump on itemKinds / statuses / lints / scope-default changes. Independent of the work tree's content version.

extends.description: OPTIONAL — relative path to a parent WORK.md. Presence makes the manifest a VIEW; absence makes it a WORKSPACE ROOT. Recursive composition: parents may themselves declare `extends`. Maximum chain depth is 8.

items.description: Either a ws:// ref to an AIP-9 operator / AIP-6 company / AIP-3 skill, or a relative path to a consumer workspace folder.

appliesTo.description: OPTIONAL — list of consumers this VIEW adapts the workspace for. Hosts MUST refuse the view if any binding does not resolve. Not inherited; views declare their own scope.

executor.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-9 operator that runs work items emitted by this workspace (e.g. picks up `claimed` tasks, drives `in-progress`). The host activates this operator for the workspace's automation passes.

governance.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-7 policy or audit binding. May be a path to an AIP-7 policy file or a ws:// ref. Approval gates on status transitions and assignment changes flow through this ref.

knowledge.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-10 wiki this workspace refers to. Typically a `ws://wikis/<slug>/KNOWLEDGE.md` ref or a relative path to a KNOWLEDGE.md. Lets work items resolve `attachments.wiki[]` against the bound wiki by default.

name.description: Kind name. Matches the `kind` field on a work-item doctype. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

enabled.description: Whether this kind is allowed in the workspace. Child views can disable a parent's kind by setting `enabled: false`.

fields.description: Canonical fields beyond the base spec. Child views append fields to parent's set.

icon.description: OPTIONAL — display hint, typically a single emoji.

description.description: OPTIONAL — prose describing what items of this kind capture.

itemKinds.description: Work-item kinds this workspace tracks. Merge-by-name against the extends parent: a child entry with the same name replaces the parent's; new names are appended. Custom kinds (beyond project / initiative / task) are allowed when an adapter understands them.

id.description: Stable kebab-case status id. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

terminal.description: Whether this status is terminal (e.g. done, cancelled). Terminal states accept no further transitions except to `archived`-equivalents.

transitionsTo.description: Allowed next status ids. The host MUST refuse transitions outside this list.

statuses.description: Status state machine. Merge-by-id against the extends parent: a child entry with the same id replaces the parent's; new ids are appended. A child that flips a parent status's `terminal` classification SHOULD trigger a `work_status_drift` warning.

defaultContainment.description: OPTIONAL — slug of a default parent project/initiative new items default to.

defaultApplicability.description: OPTIONAL — default applicability axis values (role / operator / project slugs) for new items in this view.

defaultOwner.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-9 operator slug used as default `assignee` (tasks) or `lead` (projects/initiatives) when new items are created without explicit ownership.

ownershipPolicy.description: How ownership is enforced. 'strict' = ownership MUST match scope.applicability; 'inherit' = empty ownership inherits from containment chain; 'open' = any operator may claim regardless of scope.

scope.description: Defaults for the three orthogonal scope axes (containment / applicability / ownership). Each leaf field overrides independently across the extends chain.

id.description: Stable kebab-case lint id. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

kind.description: Lint algorithm. 'custom' delegates to a host-defined check identified by `id`.

appliesTo.description: Item kind name (e.g. 'task') or '*' for all kinds.

severity.description: Lint severity. Child views may soften (warn -> info) but governance policies may forbid that.

params.description: Kind-specific parameters. e.g. { days: 14 } for 'overdue'; { days: 30 } for 'stale'.

lints.description: Lint rules. Merge-by-id against the extends parent: a child entry with the same id replaces the parent's; new ids are appended.

workflow.description: OPTIONAL — default AIP-15 WORKFLOW.md path or ref. Items without an explicit workflow inherit this one.

approvalClass.description: OPTIONAL — default AIP-7 approval class for status transitions and ownership changes. 'auto' = no approval; 'always' = approval on every change; 'on-mutate' = only on field mutation; 'policy:<ref>' = delegate to a named policy.

defaults.description: Default workflow / approval bindings. Each leaf field overrides independently across the extends chain.

homePage.description: OPTIONAL — slug of the work item to use as the workspace landing page.

defaultGrouping.description: Default grouping for list / board UIs.

display.description: Display hints for UIs that render the workspace. Runtime-agnostic.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions, namespaced under <vendor>. Deep-merged across the extends chain.

allOf.description: A view (any manifest with appliesTo set) MUST extend a parent. A workspace-root manifest has neither field.
